entry.title: Building a 1-Outlet, 4-GPU Workstation
entry.summary: As a grad student, the one thing I desperately wanted was a GPU workstation. As a gainfully employed adult I can finally make that happen.

entry.title: Agents have (Information) Needs
entry.summary: Information retrieval is about satisfying an information need, but a query is a poor stand-in. Your agent is capable of expressing one, so you should probably use it.

entry.title: OCR's Cambrian Explosion 1 - Introduction
entry.summary: Strong, open VLMs enabled an explosion of open OCR model releases, with little sign of things letting up. In this survey, I detail the models, their evaluation, research trends, and open questions.

entry.title: Google Gemini 102 - Advanced Structured Outputs
entry.summary: Probing the supported output types of Gemini.

entry.title: Google Gemini 101 - Object Detection
entry.summary: Navigating Gemini's API for object detection with vision and Structured Outputs.

entry.title: Be Careful Interpreting Averaged Benchmarks
entry.summary: Thoughts on averaged benchmarks and hidden correlations.

entry.title: Introduction to TinyHNSW
entry.summary: The first post in the TinyHNSW series, introducing the tutorial and the library.
